title: bridge-matrix AS handler reprocesses retried homeserver txns
description: bridge-matrix/src/bridge.rs:90 — as_transaction ignores txn_id (bound to _txn_id and never stored). The Matrix AS spec requires idempotent transaction processing: homeservers retry PUT /transactions/{txn_id} on timeout or 5xx. When retried, the bridge reprocesses all events in the transaction, broadcasting duplicate Chat messages to nie. Fix: maintain a bounded deque of recently-seen txn_ids and return 200 without reprocessing if the txn_id is already known.
